title: Field cognition — infinite-dimension think tanks
motto: Not neural networks. Field amplitude, truth-gated series, melded plates — infinitely scalable without backprop tax.
why_field_beats_neural: Infinite dimensions — slice keys hash into a field; no fixed layer width ceiling
Amplitude superposition — verdict-weighted merge, not slow matrix multiply chains
Plate meld — flock+fsync+chain truth; weights cannot drift silently like untrained nets
Truth gates before adapt — 94% noise rejected; neural adapt often ingests garbage
On-the-fly utility chambers — spawn lanes without retrain or GPU epoch
Eyes·Ears·Mouth fuse into sense meld — perception is field-native, not CNN bolt-on
equipment_role: Autonomous AI holds field gates; legacy neural literacy is reference-only for operator education.
